name: Skol
title: The Shattered King
pull_message: My kingdom lies in ruins.. I pray you prove stronger than my old throne.

name: Eve
title: The Forbidden Apothecary
pull_message: The air around us is sweet and venomous. Careful.. my gifts always have teeth.

name: Kay
title: The Isolationist
pull_message: I've watched from the edges too long. You'd better be worth stepping into the light for.

name: Sigmund
title: Houndmaster of the Crimson Hunt
pull_message: Hear the hounds? They've caught your scent. The hunt begins.. with you of course.

name: Velour
title: The Druid of Verdant Tempests
pull_message: The wild wind answers your call. Stand ready.. I bring storm, root, and fang.

name: Flora
title: Scion of the World Tree's Heart
pull_message: The World Tree stirs at your name. I bloom for you, carrying its living heart.

name: Yvenn
title: Penultimate Slayer Master
pull_message: My blades still thirst. Tell me.. will you be the one who finally satisfies them?

name: Rowan
title: The Stormblade
pull_message: Walk beside me, I'll carve your path through the storm.

name: Mira
title: Embercaller
pull_message: Ash and embers are all that I know. Try not to burn.

name: Garrick
title: Iron Vanguard
pull_message: As long as I stand, nothing will reach you.

name: Seren
title: Moonlit Warden
pull_message: The moon watches us both. Join me in its glow.

name: Darius
title: Bloodsworn Knight
pull_message: I seal this pact in blood. My sword is now yours to spend.

name: Hale
title: Shield Guard
pull_message: I'll take the first blow for you. I always do.

name: Brigit
title: Battle Cleric
pull_message: Fight beside me, I'll bring both prayer and pain.

name: Orin
title: Scout
pull_message: I've already mapped the exits. Try not to need them too soon.

name: Lena
title: Arcanist
pull_message: New spells beg to be tested on living targets. Shall we begin with you?

name: Rolf
title: Axe Warrior
pull_message: Point me at whatever needs splitting. I live for that sound.

name: Mirae
title: Bow Ranger
pull_message: My arrow always find their mark.. a warning and a promise.
